## Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes introduced by this pull request. Explain the problem being solved or the feature being added, and any relevant context or design decisions.

## Related Issue
Fixes # (issue number) or links to related issue/discussion.

## Type of Change
Please check the options that are relevant:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring or cleanup (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance optimization

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or typecheck errors
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally

## Screenshots / Screen Recordings (if applicable)
If your change affects the user interface (UI) or user experience (UX), please attach a screenshot or, ideally, a screen recording showing the visual changes or new interactions.
